title: DataObjectBuildOrgTemplate - Metadata API
description: Represents the derived object template used to define the structure and configuration of data objects in a build organization. The object templates are added inside the data kit to deploy metadata.

developerName.description: Name of the data object build org template. This name can contain only underscores and alphanumeric characters and must be unique in your org.

masterLabel.description: The label of the data object build org template.

objectDevName.description: The developer name of the object created from the objectPayload entity in the build org.

objectPayload.description: The serialized metadata for the entity. The build organization deserializes this payload to create the underlying metadata components.

objectType.description: The type of metadata entity associated with the template. Valid values are: DataGraph MktCalculatedInsightObject MktDataModelObject MktDataLakeObject

templateObject.description: The name of the template associated with the data object build org template.

templateVersion.description: The version number of the data object build org template.

declarative_metadata_sample_definition.description: The following is an example of a DataObjectBuildOrgTemplate component.
